description: CompositionPurple jacket made of 100% polyester, has long raglan sleeves with slightly elasticated cuffs, hood with drawstrings and an adjustable toggle strap in the middle of the hood for a customised Fit, full front zipper, mesh panels on the sides and back, a zippered pocket on the left chest, zippered side pockets for secure storage and nike swoosh on the left chestFitComfortWash careMachine wash warm with like colours at 30 degrees using a mild detergentDo not dry clean or bleachLine dryCool iron, do not iron on decorationsExcellent breathable comfort and unparalleled weather resistance, this jacket from nike is perfect for your training sessions. Originally designed for runners, the jacket delivers lightweight comfort and weather resistance in an iconic style that goes anywhere. This jacket is made of recycled, water-resistant fabric designed to keep rain out while limiting its environmental impact. It also features a breathable mesh lining to help you stay dry and comfortable when things heat up. Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
